settings.heading: Lumae Skincare: a first Shopify store for portfolio.
settings.text: This case documents how a base theme was transformed into a premium experience while preserving native ecommerce features.
settings.panel_text: Learn the real Shopify theme workflow and build a presentable deliverable: navigable store, fictional products, key pages, and portfolio documentation.

settings.custom_liquid:
Process

Key decisions

  • Dawn as the base to preserve Online Store 2.0 best practices, performance, and native cart behavior.
  • Narrative-led homepage: promise, products, routine, social proof, and email capture.
  • Product page with benefit, ingredient, usage, and policy blocks.
  • Collection page with native filters and sorting to demonstrate real ecommerce behavior.
  • Documentation includes setup, seed products, and a presentation checklist.
